name: Hot Tamale Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 medium yellow, red or green bell pepper - seeded and finely chopped
1 can (16 oz) pinto beans, rinsed and drained
1 ear corn, kernels cut off cob, OR 3/4 cup frozen corn, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large frying pan over medium-high heat.
2. Add the onion, bell pepper, and garlic; cook until softened, about 6 to 8 minutes.
3. Remove from the heat and stir in the tomato sauce, pinto beans, corn, chili powder, cumin, salt, and cayenne.
4. Pour into an 8 x 8 glass baking dish. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
5. In a large saucepan, bring water to a boil. Add the cornmeal, lemon juice, mustard, and salt; stir until mixed.
6. Reduce heat to low and simmer, stirring often, until thickened, about 4 to 5 minutes.
7. Spread the cooked cornmeal over the bean mixture. Bake for 30 minutes.
8. Cool for 10 minutes before serving.
